Package neqsim.process.materials

Class IntegrityLifeAssessment

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.materials.IntegrityLifeAssessment
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class IntegrityLifeAssessment extends Object implements Serializable
Remaining-life and inspection-interval assessment for one material review item.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

  • Constructor Details

    • IntegrityLifeAssessment

      public IntegrityLifeAssessment()
      Creates a not-assessed life result.

  • Method Details

    • fromWallThickness

      public static IntegrityLifeAssessment fromWallThickness(double nominalThicknessMm, double currentThicknessMm, double minimumRequiredThicknessMm, double corrosionRateMmPerYear)
      Creates a life assessment from wall-thickness and corrosion-rate data.
      Parameters:
      nominalThicknessMm - nominal or original wall thickness in millimetres
      currentThicknessMm - current measured wall thickness in millimetres
      minimumRequiredThicknessMm - minimum required wall thickness in millimetres
      corrosionRateMmPerYear - predicted corrosion rate in millimetres per year
      Returns:
      populated life assessment

    • setVerdict

      public IntegrityLifeAssessment setVerdict(String verdict)
      Sets the verdict.
      Parameters:
      verdict - verdict string
      Returns:
      this assessment for fluent construction

    • getVerdict

      public String getVerdict()
      Gets the verdict.
      Returns:
      verdict string

    • getRemainingLifeYears

      public double getRemainingLifeYears()
      Gets the remaining life.
      Returns:
      remaining life in years, or -1 when not assessed

    • getInspectionIntervalYears

      public int getInspectionIntervalYears()
      Gets the inspection interval.
      Returns:
      inspection interval in years

    • addNote

      public IntegrityLifeAssessment addNote(String note)
      Adds a note.
      Parameters:
      note - note text
      Returns:
      this assessment for fluent construction

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Converts this assessment to a JSON-ready map.
      Returns:
      map representation of the assessment

      private void assignVerdictAndInterval()
      Assigns verdict and inspection interval from the remaining life result.
